flow_points: Nepal scored 46 runs for 1 wicket in the Powerplay.
J Mosca anchored Nepal's innings, scoring 60 runs off 44 balls and contributing 48.4% of their total.
BAD Manenti delivered a crucial bowling spell for Italy, taking 2 wickets for just 9 runs from 4 overs. This spell created significant defensive pressure.
CJPF Kalugamage delivered an impactful spell for Nepal, securing 3 wickets for 18 runs from 4 overs.
JT Smuts also bowled a crucial spell for Nepal, taking 1 wicket for 22 runs from 4 overs.
Italy's chase began with a dominant Powerplay, scoring 68 runs for 0 wickets at an 11.33 run rate, establishing early momentum.
AJ Mosca anchored Italy's innings with an unbeaten 62 runs off 32 balls, contributing 50.0% of the team's runs.
BAD Manenti's sustained defensive pressure, highlighted by his 2-wicket spell for 9 runs, was a pivotal turning point in the match.
AJ Mosca's match-winning innings of 62(32) provided the crucial anchor for Italy's victory.
